fields.name: Courage
fields.desc: Someone who tries even when they feel scared or unsure.

fields.name: Kindness
fields.desc: Someone who cares about how others feel and helps them.

fields.name: Honesty
fields.desc: Someone who tells the truth, even when it is hard.

fields.name: Patience
fields.desc: Someone who can wait calmly without getting upset.

fields.name: Generosity
fields.desc: Someone who loves to share what they have with others.

fields.name: Perseverance
fields.desc: Someone who keeps trying and does not give up easily.

fields.name: Responsibility
fields.desc: Someone who takes ownership and follows through on what they promise.

fields.name: Empathy
fields.desc: Someone who understands and shares the feelings of others.

fields.name: Gratitude
fields.desc: Someone who notices good things and remembers to say thank you.
